title: tryphostemma nummularium
intro: Tryphostemma nummularium is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Celastraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It has been reported to have several health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
